page_metadata.biotools__summary: Query-driven search engine for large gene expression microarray compendia. Given a small set of query genes, identifies which datasets are most informative for these genes, then within those datasets additional genes are identified with expression profiles most similar to the query set.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Query-driven search engine for large gene expression microarray compendia. Given a small set of query genes, identifies which datasets are most informative for these genes, then within those datasets additional genes are identified with expression profiles most similar to the query set.
